title: aerva nervosa
intro: Aerva nervosa, also known as the knot grass, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Amaranthaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine, and is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Aerva nervosa include the potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and treat various respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Aerva nervosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and powder, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
